site.title: Themadhood's Applications
site.tagline: User-facing software releases, tools, and applications built under Themadhood's Codes.
site.metaDescription: Themadhood's Applications is the applications branch under Themadhood's Codes, covering games, development tools, apps, and executables.

footer.title: Themadhood's Applications
footer.line2: Themadhood's Applications operates under Themadhood's Codes.

hero.headline: Themadhood's Applications
body: Themadhood's Applications is the user-facing software branch operating within Themadhood's Codes. It exists to build tools, programs, and interactive software releases that connect technical systems to practical real-world use.

This branch focuses on applications that can be used directly, including games, development tooling, utilities, and packaged executables. The goal is to release software that is structured, maintainable, and built with long-term support in mind.

By maintaining a dedicated applications division, Themadhood can publish software with clear identity and consistent organization. Applications provides the structure for releases that remain accessible and expandable over time.

about.title: ABOUT US
body: Themadhood's Applications was established to support software releases and practical tooling across the Themadhood ecosystem. As part of Themadhood's Codes, it exists to build programs that are usable, maintainable, and structured for long-term development.

The branch supports multiple categories of software, including games, development utilities, general apps, and packaged executables intended for broader distribution. Emphasis is placed on clear project structure, reliable behavior, and the ability to evolve releases over time without losing continuity.
Applications is built for real use. It ensures that projects ship with intent, remain organized across releases, and stay connected to the broader technical ecosystem that supports them.

items.title: Themadhood's Games
items.body: Games and interactive experiences built under Themadhood, including long-term project releases and experiments.

items.title: Themadhood's Development Tools
items.body: Tools created to support development workflows, project management, deployment, and automation.

items.title: Themadhood's Apps
items.body: General applications created under Themadhood, including utilities and user-facing software tools.

items.title: Themadhood's Executables
items.body: Packaged builds and distributable executables created for releases, demos, and stable software distribution.

items.title: Other/ Routed Through Us
items.body: Requests that don’t clearly fall under a specific applications subtree, including experimental releases.

contact.title: CONNECT WITH US
contact.note: GitHub Pages is static-only. If you want submissions, wire this up to Formspree/Netlify Forms later.
